def calculate_shipping(order):
    base = _base_rate(order.destination.country, order.weight)
    priority_mult = _priority_multiplier(order.priority)
    surcharge = _surcharge(order)
    return base * priority_mult + surcharge


def _base_rate(country, weight):
    rates = {
        "US": 15.00 if weight > 50 else 5.00,
        "CA": 30.00 if weight > 50 else 20.00,
    }
    return rates.get(country, 60.00 if weight > 50 else 40.00)


def _priority_multiplier(priority):
    return {"express": 2.0, "standard": 1.0}.get(priority, 0.8)


def _surcharge(order):
    if order.priority == "express" and order.insurance:
        if order.destination.state in ("HI", "AK"):
            return 10.00
    return 0.00
